mapper.insert: INSERT INTO position_favorite (position_id, student_id, create_time) VALUES (#{positionId}, #{studentId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM position_favorite WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM position_favorite WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT position_id FROM position_favorite WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT id, position_id AS positionId, student_id AS studentId, create_time AS createTime FROM position_favorite WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
